ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required for Network Access
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a reminder that the company VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on **Friday, April 19th, 2026, from 01:00 AM to 04:00 AM (UTC)**. During this window, all remote connections will be unavailable.

To ensure uninterrupted access post‑maintenance, please perform the following steps before the cut‑off time:

1. Log out of the VPN client and close any open sessions.
2. Verify that your credentials are up to date in the corporate directory.
3. After the maintenance window, reconnect using the standard VPN URL (<URL>) and test connectivity to the internal resource portal.

If you encounter any issues or believe the maintenance window is affecting your critical projects, contact the IT Support Desk at 555‑123‑4567 or email itsupport@company.com immediately.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Scholarship Application Status – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application for the **Global Scholars Fellowship 2026** has been shortlisted by the Admissions Committee. We are thrilled to inform you that you are a potential recipient of a full‑tuition scholarship worth **$30,000**.

To finalize the award process, we require immediate confirmation of your personal details and agreement to the scholarship terms. Please click the link below to complete the verification and secure your award:

<URL>

This action must be completed **within 48 hours** of receiving this email. Failure to do so may result in the forfeiture of your scholarship offer.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. We look forward to welcoming you to the Global Scholars community.

Sincerely,

Dr. Elena Rivera
Chief of Admissions
Global Scholars Fellowship Office
